graph order
80
adjacency matrix

label vector
25 78 19 56 29 47 48 21 28 16 26 10 35 18 61 70 64 8 5 11 14 23 45 55 42 54 36 74 43 2 15 40 3 31 30 49 41 22 72 1 52 76 79 50 57 53 71 51 6 9 59 12 80 20 77 63 37 38 60 62 27 7 65 4 67 32 69 66 34 58 24 33 17 44 75 13 68 39 73 46
